'''Harmon''' was a [[human]] [[Gender|male]] who served against the [[Galactic Empire|Empire]] with the [[Mykapo insurgents]], in [[Iron Squadron]]. He was in love with [[Sato|Mart Mattin's father]].<ref name="A Youth Unpromising" />
